# Copilot Instructions — CLI Intro Session

## What this repo is
Materials for a 60-minute hands-on Copilot CLI intro session targeting partner-facing roles at Microsoft (PSA, PTS, PDM, GTM, PSS, managers). Non-coders. All English.

## Repo layout
```
v2/                  Active session materials
  deck/              HTML slide deck (7-shades style), presenter view, storyboard
  demos/             Facilitator demo scripts with exact prompts and talking points
  exercises/         Attendee exercise sheets with copy-paste prompts
  pre-work/          Setup guide and verification checklist (send before session)
  reference/         Cheat sheet, troubleshooting, after-session resource links
  GETTING-STARTED.md Beginner-friendly explainer (what is a repo, jargon decoder)
v1/                  Archived first version (for reference only)
```

## Key positioning
- M365 Copilot helps with work → CLI operationalizes work
- Four properties: tool-connected, repeatable, inspectable, persistent
- Every use case tested against: "What's the delta vs M365 Copilot?"
- Audience is non-coders — avoid dev jargon, explain everything in plain language

## When editing materials
- Keep tone conversational and non-technical
- Emphasize "just talk to it" — no syntax memorization needed
- All exercise prompts should be copy-paste ready
- Add navigation links between pages (what's next, see also)
- Maintain the 7-shades HTML slide style (light cream theme, teal accents, Plus Jakarta Sans + Inter)
